name: Alpha Hpa Limited
analysis: A4N's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 17% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$0.8000. Trade idea: entry A$0.8350, stop A$0.7078, target A$0.9350 (0.79:1) — then trail it.
